methodology: Pinned public production-code excerpts are replayed offline for benchmarked real-world parser/template bugs, and remaining benchmark categories use minimized local payload reductions. The suite preserves failure classes, public provenance, and deterministic local replay.

cases.display_name: Phi-style chat template role delimiter forgery
cases.bug_class: attacker-controlled role/content fields can render model control delimiters

upstream_issues.title: Phi-style chat-template role delimiter handling
affected_versions: phi-style ChatML reductions before patched template handling
workarounds: Escape or JSON-encode user-controlled fields before rendering role delimiters.

cases.bug_class: normalization plus added special tokens invalidates a pinned tokenizer expectation

upstream_issues.title: Tokenizer added-token and normalization drift
fixed_versions: pin exact tokenizer revision and expected added-token metadata
workarounds: Regenerate PromptABI lockfiles when tokenizer normalizers or added tokens change.

cases.display_name: Qwen XML-like tool parameter stop overreach
cases.bug_class: tool argument strings can contain configured XML close-marker stops

upstream_issues.title: Qwen XML tool-call stop overreach
affected_versions: XML-like tool templates with close-marker stop strings
workarounds: Use provider-native tool calls or choose stops that cannot occur inside tool argument strings.

cases.bug_class: provider migration can lose tool IDs, streaming chunks, stop semantics, context limits, and structured-output fields

upstream_issues.title: OpenAI-compatible provider migration contract regressions
workarounds: Keep migration gates enabled until target providers preserve tool IDs, stream chunks, stops, and structured-output fields.

cases.bug_class: application parser accepts outputs outside the constrained structured-output contract

upstream_issues.title: Structured-output parser/schema mismatch reduction
workarounds: Validate constrained-decoding grammar and application parser against the same normalized JSON contract.

cases.display_name: RAG chunk metadata and citation truncation
cases.bug_class: RAG chunk packing can drift tokenizers, drop citations, miscount overlap, and exceed payload limits

upstream_issues.title: RAG citation and metadata truncation reduction
affected_versions: rag-chunking promptabi fixture before fixed budget
workarounds: Reserve explicit token budget for citations and count metadata/template overhead with the serving tokenizer.

cases.bug_class: training manifest target roles include a role absent from the serving chat template

upstream_issues.title: Supervised fine-tuning target role misalignment reduction
affected_versions: training manifest with assistant and critic target roles
workarounds: Require target roles to be declared by the serving chat template before packing or masking training examples.
